name: ziprecruiter-stealth
description: ZipRecruiter sits behind Cloudflare's 'Just a moment…' 403 challenge. With FIRECRAWL_API_KEY set, job.ts routes www.ziprecruiter.com straight to Firecrawl with proxy:stealth and bypasses the wall. Mirrors the indeed-stealth / glassdoor-stealth pattern.

data.markdown:
# Sr. DevOps Engineer

**Border States Industries** — Fargo, ND

## About the role

Border States is looking for a Senior DevOps Engineer to own our cloud infrastructure and CI/CD automation. You'll design the platforms that keep our e-commerce and ERP stacks running across 80+ branches.

## Responsibilities

- Design and operate AWS infrastructure using Terraform
- Build GitHub Actions CI/CD pipelines for 30+ services
- Monitor production systems with Datadog and respond to incidents
- Partner with security on SOC2 compliance and patch cadence
- Mentor engineers across cloud, networking, and Kubernetes

## Requirements

- 5+ years in SRE / DevOps / platform engineering
- Deep AWS and Terraform experience
- Strong Python or Go fluency
- Linux internals and network fundamentals
- Observability stacks (Datadog, Grafana, Prometheus)

metadata.title: Sr. DevOps Engineer - Border States Industries - Fargo, ND
